params_used.custom_text:
// This module processes a 16-bit ADC value and outputs a 4-bit binary value indicating the range of the input value.
// If the ADC value is between 0-1023, it outputs 15; if between 1024-2047, it outputs 0; if between 2048-3071, it outputs 1; if between 3072-4095, it outputs 2; and for values above 4095, it outputs 3.
